# `idx dirs` for [filesystem](/commands/categories/filesystem.md)

<div class='command-title'>List indexed directories from idx state.</div>

## Signature

```> idx dirs {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input   | output       |
| ------- | ------------ |
| nothing | list&lt;record&gt; |
## Examples

List all indexed directories
```nu
> idx dirs

```
